mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_post ( user_id, rec_id, title, content, is_public ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{recId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isPublic} )
mapper.select:
SELECT bp.post_id, bp.user_id, u.nickname, bp.title, bp.content, bp.is_public, bp.view_count, bp.comment_count, bp.created_at, bp.updated_at,
r.rec_id, r.style_type, r.tpo_type, r.ai_explanation,
ws.weather_id, ws.weather_status, ws.temp, ws.feels_like, ws.humidity, ws.wind_speed, ws.place_name
FROM board_post bp JOIN users u ON u.user_id = bp.user_id JOIN recommendation r ON r.rec_id = bp.rec_id LEFT JOIN weather_snapshot ws ON ws.weather_id = r.weather_id
WHERE bp.post_id = #{postId} AND bp.deleted_at IS NULL AND bp.is_public = TRUE
mapper.update: UPDATE board_post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE board_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_public = #{isPublic}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE board_post SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM board_post WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_post WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT ri.item_id, ri.rec_id, ri.category, ri.item_name, ri.item_image_url, ri.display_order FROM board_post bp JOIN recommendation_item ri ON ri.rec_id = bp.rec_id WHERE bp.post_id = #{postId} AND bp.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY ri.display_order ASC, ri.item_id ASC
